use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in landing pages and marketing sites
Interactive navigation elements with animated text transitions
Modern UI buttons requiring smooth hover feedback with 3D depth effects
ai_summary: Chronicle Button is an animated button component featuring a distinctive 3D flip text transition effect on hover, implemented with CSS perspective transforms and cubic-bezier easing. The button uses CSS custom properties for flexible theming and supports outlined variants, making it suitable for modern SaaS, e-commerce, and dev-tool interfaces requiring engaging interactive elements.
